_comment: User agents for simulated sessions. One entry from 'userAgents' is chosen at RANDOM per session. Each UA gets a coherent viewport + platform derived from the string. Leave the array EMPTY to fall back to the built-in defaults in src/sim/useragents.js. Changes take effect on app restart / redeploy.
_note: Versions current as of June 2026 (Chrome 148, Firefox 150, Safari 26, iOS 18.7). NOTE: the engine is real Chromium, so the Chrome/Edge entries are the most fingerprint-coherent; Firefox/Safari UAs on Chromium can be detected by sophisticated anti-bot systems. Drop them if you only want undetectable Chromium traffic.
userAgents: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
